mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate lowers discount rates and eases financial conditions, which supports equity multiples and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next month when the policy rate is already near the effective lower bound.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX forward returns are not higher than unconditional returns after FEDFUNDS declines over any 3-month rolling window, or if the sign flips positive in tightening periods with similar magnitude.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE signals a demand shock and weaker earnings expectations, so a month-ahead decline in unemployment should be associated with positive S&P 500 returns, while rising unemployment should predict losses.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered periods with rising UNRATE do not produce negative 20-day SPX returns in at least 60% of cases, or if the average forward return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Rising RSAFS indicates stronger consumer spending and revenue growth, which should lift earnings expectations and produce positive S&P 500 returns over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: Reject if positive monthly changes in RSAFS are not followed by above-baseline 20-day SPX returns in walk-forward tests, or if the sign is persistently negative over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO and HOUST both strengthen together, it signals broad real-activity acceleration and inventory demand, which should translate into positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint state of rising INDPRO and rising HOUST does not outperform each series alone for 60-day forward SPX returns, or if the combined signal has Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL inflation acceleration paired with a higher FEDFUNDS rate tightens real financing conditions and raises discount rates, which should فشار equity prices and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation rises above its prior 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if high-inflation periods with elevated FEDFUNDS do not show below-baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if the interaction term is not negative in rolling out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in HOUST below trend marks a housing-demand slowdown that transmits to construction, credit, and consumption, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST-below-trend episodes do not precede negative 5-day SPX returns more often than positive ones, or if the signal loses sign consistency across two consecutive years.

mechanism_narrative: In a weak labor market, simultaneous declines in PAYEMS and rises in UNRATE confirm deteriorating household income and demand, which should predict negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS declines for 2 consecutive months and UNRATE rises
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-UNRATE deterioration regime does not produce negative 20-day SPX returns in a majority of triggered observations, or if PAYEMS alone explains the same effect without interaction.

mechanism_narrative: During a late-cycle slowdown, weak INDPRO combined with soft RSAFS indicates falling output and sales momentum, which should lead to negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter as earnings revisions turn down.
failure_condition: Reject if joint declines in INDPRO and RSAFS do not precede below-unconditional 60-day SPX returns, or if the combined signal has no incremental predictive power versus either proxy alone.
